metadata.title:
Stencil From the Refuse Below Mon
roe Street Bridge Annoys Residents
of That Neighborhood and Peace
full Valley Is Up in Arms.

pages.raw_text:
Once the burdened residents of Peaceful Valley
appealing without recourse oS an abolition of unsani
tary conditions


The board of public works is again refusing relief and
the board of health has declined to take action because Of
the municipal superiority of the board


The contention this time is that the street sweepngs
and other refuse and filth deposited just below
the Monroe street bridge Main avenue.


From that spot arises odors which smell up and down
the most expensive driveway the city has attempted
to build.


Nothing more unsanary can be deposited aside from
the night SOIL yet the city commissioners declare they
have no other place to dump the filth


All OF the street sweepings formerly dumped
through trap in the Monroe street bridge.


Objections made to the dumping of the refuse in
this manner and the kick made strong that the
board of public works was forced to heed it.


Then it that orders given Foreman Tllisch to
create dump


81 working under the orders of the board of public
works. said Foreman Tillisch today. ave must have
place to put the street sweepngs sheet iron slide
has been put in and all of the refuse is dumped that
and run down to the river. If we abandon that dump
have other place to put the street sweepings'


Peaceful Valley residents and those taxpayers using
the Main hill up and declare that the
unsanary features Of the dump must be done away with
They claim there places along the river which could
be better used than the big fill below the bridge
-2o strong the odors rising from the dump that
people prefer to climb around the hill from Riverside
rather than the pathway down under the bridge.


Residents of the Dodd block and roomers in the Mer-
chants hotel complain of the odors in the evening.


With the wind in that direction it will be impossible
to use the Masonic temple.
